docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANDRING, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIA, STEVEN ANTHONY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-02-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIA, STEVEN ANTHONY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF ERIC STANDRING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN ANTHONY SILVERIA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANDRING, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVERIA, STEVEN ANTHONY $8,399.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,489.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF VS. DEFENDANT. $399.00 - APPRAISAL $8000 - DIMINISHED VALUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,544.00 FILED BY STANDRING, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIA, STEVEN ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIA, STEVEN ANTHONY
